_note: Standalone single-mode manifest config. system-spec-kit is a normal, registry-less skill (no mode-registry.json); its sole workflow mode is system-spec-kit. Its SKILL.md INTENT_SIGNALS + RESOURCE_MAP router routes ONLY into references/ and assets/, so those two doc corpora are the routable leaves and the only declared leafRoots. Everything else in the package is deliberately excluded because it is runtime or non-routable: scripts/, mcp_server/, shared/, templates/, constitutional/, changelog/, runtime/, checkpoints/, config/, vectors/ are the spec-kit + memory-MCP engine (not documentation leaves); feature_catalog/ and manual_testing_playbook/ are runtime-engine capability docs and behavior-test fixtures, not intent->doc routing targets (no RESOURCE_MAP intent selects them), so they are NOT leafRoots. Consumed by generate-leaf-manifest.cjs to emit leaf-manifest.json (byte-stable under --check). Regenerate leaf-manifest.json and keep leaf-aliases.json in sync whenever the references/ or assets/ corpus changes.
